text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was so amazing out there... I just knew
there was no way I could catch up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Why couldn't I match their determination? I'm so
ashamed of myself... Argh!
choice_data_list: But you were still great out there.
Use this loss as a springboard to future success.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I can't deny that I tried my best. I
should at least acknowledge that.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty... I can't forget how hard I've worked
today. I'm gonna use that as inspiration to give it
all I've got from tomorrow onwards!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Today's loss really hurts... And that's exactly why I
can't let myself forget it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I really need to dive deep, analyzing why I lost
and seeing what I did wrong.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Then I can use the knowledge I gain to do better
in my next race! I hope you'll help me out,
Trainer!
